bridge_equation_v25.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v25 = mix(B_plastic_v24, L_steady, 1 - P_steady, D_feature_v19, 1 - G_brain_v19)
bridge_equation_v25.structure_term: B_struct_v25 = mix(B_struct_v24, S_steady, R_steady, 1 - P_steady, D_structure_v19)
bridge_equation_v25.readiness_term: R_train_v25 = mix(R_train_v24, B_plastic_v25, B_struct_v25, R_steady, D_align_v19, 1 - P_steady)
